discoveryTopics.name: New commercial robot deployments
discoveryTopics.objective: Identify newly announced or newly deployed commercial robots (2025-2026) not already tracked in the dataset.

discoveryTopics.name: Cross-industry capability trends
discoveryTopics.objective: Identify meaningful capability shifts across industries: autonomy, reliability, dexterity, and deployment scale.

discoveryTopics.name: Pricing and business model changes
discoveryTopics.objective: Find pricing model changes (RaaS, capex, service contracts) for major commercial robots.
queryHints: robot as a service pricing update 2026
